summary: Frontend testing completed for 3 UX improvements in preprocessing flow. All 3 features verified working correctly: (1) Proceed to Training button at bottom of Preprocess tab, (2) Preprocessing nudge banner on Analysis tab, (3) Preprocessing Applied card in training results. All regression tests passed.

issues:
Minor: validateDOMNesting warning -
cannot appear as descendant of

in Badge component (pre-existing issue from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: FEATURE 1 VERIFIED: PreprocessView.js lines 408-430 - 'Proceed to Training' card with data-testid='proceed-to-training-card' and button with data-testid='proceed-to-training-btn' working correctly
FEATURE 2 VERIFIED: AnalysisView.js lines 242-267 - Preprocessing nudge with data-testid='preprocessing-nudge' and button data-testid='go-to-preprocess-btn' working correctly
FEATURE 3 VERIFIED: AnalysisView.js lines 300-321 - Preprocessing Applied card with data-testid='preprocessing-applied-card' displays correctly after training with preprocessing configured

Note: Feature 3 only shows when preprocessing steps are actually applied during training (e.g., scaling, outlier treatment). If dataset has no missing values and only 'Missing Values' is configured, the card may not appear.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 preprocessing UX improvements verified working. Insurance Costs sample dataset (1100 rows, 9 columns) used for testing. Training completes in ~5-10 seconds. The preprocessing nudge shows different states: green when preprocessing active, amber when issues detected, blue when no preprocessing configured. The 'Proceed to Training' card shows count of active preprocessing steps. The 'Preprocessing Applied' card in training results shows detailed log of what was applied (e.g., 'Applied standardization (z-score) to 10 features').

FEATURE_1_PROCEED_TO_TRAINING_BUTTON.description: Card at bottom of Preprocess tab showing active preprocessing steps count with 'Proceed to Training' button that navigates to Analysis tab
FEATURE_1_PROCEED_TO_TRAINING_BUTTON.verified_behavior: Card shows '3 preprocessing step(s) will be applied during training: Missing Values, Feature Scaling, Outlier Treatment' when multiple steps configured

FEATURE_2_PREPROCESSING_NUDGE.description: Banner in Model Configuration section showing preprocessing status with Configure/Edit button
FEATURE_2_PREPROCESSING_NUDGE.verified_behavior: Shows 'Preprocessing active: Missing Values → Feature Scaling → Outlier Treatment will be applied during training.' with Edit button

FEATURE_3_PREPROCESSING_APPLIED_CARD.description: Card in training results showing preprocessing steps that were executed
FEATURE_3_PREPROCESSING_APPLIED_CARD.verified_behavior: Shows 'Preprocessing Applied (2 steps)' with details like 'Outliers: InsuranceCost: 7 values clipped' and 'Scaling: Applied standardization (z-score) to 10 features'

preprocess_tab_config_cards.description: All 4 configuration cards present on Preprocess tab

smart_recommendations.description: Smart Recommendations card present on Preprocess tab

training_completion.description: Training completes successfully with preprocessing configured
training_completion.result: Ridge Regression model trained with R² of 97.33%
